identity.name: GOVERN.AI
identity.mission: The Sovereign Control Plane for Enterprise AI

scale.caption: text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-500
scale.code: font-mono text-sm text-blue-400 bg-slate-900/50 px-1 py-0.5 rounded

typography.installation_instructions: Add Space Grotesk and JetBrains Mono via Google Fonts in index.html or import in CSS.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.4)] transition-all duration-300 rounded-sm font-medium px-6 py-2.5
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-700 text-slate-200 border border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-600 transition-all duration-300 rounded-sm font-medium px-6 py-2.5
buttons.ghost: text-slate-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-slate-800/50 transition-all duration-200 rounded-sm px-4 py-2

cards.base: bg-slate-900/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-slate-800 rounded-sm p-6 hover:border-slate-700 transition-colors duration-300
cards.interactive: group relative overflow-hidden bg-slate-900/40 border border-slate-800 hover:border-blue-500/50 transition-all duration-500 rounded-sm p-6 cursor-pointer

inputs.base: bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 rounded-sm px-4 py-2.5 text-slate-200 placeholder-slate-600 transition-all duration-200 w-full

status_badge.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border

gradients.border_beam: absolute inset-0 rounded-sm pointer-events-none border border-transparent [mask-clip:padding-box,border-box] [mask-composite:intersect] [mask-image:linear-gradient(transparent,transparent),linear-gradient(#000,#000)] after:absolute after:inset-[-2px] after:aspect-square after:w-[200%] after:animate-border-beam after:bg-gradient-to-l after:from-[transparent] after:via-blue-500 after:to-[transparent]

motion.philosophy: Precision and Feedback. No bouncy springs. Smooth, linear or ease-out transitions.

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure all text on dark backgrounds is at least Slate-400. Avoid Slate-600 or darker for essential text.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have a visible focus ring (ring-2 ring-blue-500 ring-offset-2 ring-offset-slate-950).

instructions_to_main_agent: IMPERATIVE: Use 'Space Grotesk' for all headings. Import it.
IMPERATIVE: The dashboard must use a Sidebar Layout, not a top-nav layout.
IMPERATIVE: All cards in the dashboard should use the 'High Density' grid rules.
IMPERATIVE: Use 'Lucide-React' for icons. Shield, Lock, Activity, Server, Users, FileText.
IMPERATIVE: The 'Sovereign' feel comes from the color palette (Slate 950 + Blue 500) and sharp borders. Avoid too much rounding.
IMPERATIVE: Implement the 'Bilingual' toggle in the sidebar or top bar (IT/EN).
IMPERATIVE: All data visualizations (charts) must be accessible and use the defined palette.
IMPERATIVE: For the 'Audit Trail', use a dense table layout with monospace font for logs.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
